title: Owning B2B on TikTok
summary: Transforming Square's B2B storytelling on TikTok

body.text: We partnered with Square’s marketing leadership and hosted a full-day workshop to explore a transformative approach to reaching the growing B2B audience on TikTok. The session centered on shifting away from conventional product-focused messaging toward authentic, business community-centric storytelling and comprehensive brand world building. Drawing on FinTok cultural insights and the real-world needs of small business owners and entrepreneurs, the strategy positioned Square as a trusted voice that delivers genuine value beyond transactions and fosters deeper connections within the TikTok entrepreneur community.

The resulting campaign delivers a cohesive brand world that spans highly practical 1:1 business optimization advice to more personal explorations of founder wellness and mindset. Content ranges from actionable guidance on minimizing startup risk through pop-ups, testing product offerings, and launching smart merch drops to community events that celebrate self-care, neighborhood connection, and the human side of entrepreneurship. By blending these elements into community-driven storytelling, Square has created an authentic, helpful presence that resonates with B2B audiences and strengthens long-term loyalty on the platform.
